division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: If any provision of this act or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, that invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of the act which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this act are severable.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 2.5. Miscellaneous Title Provisions [6150 - 6172]
#### Article 1. Certificate of Title as Evidence [6150 - 6154]
##### § 6154

If any provision of this act or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, that invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of the act which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this act are severable.

*(Added by Stats. 1994, Ch. 1247, Sec. 6. Effective January 1, 1995.)*

subsections.text: If any provision of this act or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, that invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of the act which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this act are severable.
